content:
Welcome to my academic website! I am an MSc student in economics at the São Paulo School of Economics. I am interested in topics in applied microeconomics, particularly those related to behavioral economics and political economy. In my current research, I use field experiments and other applied methods to study topics related to political economy, social identity, and discrimination.
You can find my complete CV here, and take a look at my research here.
summary: Welcome to my academic website! I am an MSc student in economics at the São Paulo School of Economics. I am interested in topics in applied microeconomics, particularly those related to behavioral economics and political economy.
title: Pedro Sant'Anna
